query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A view of a residential area with houses, trees, and shrubs under a cloudy sky. The buildings have pitched roofs and are arranged along a road, with scattered clouds visible above the rooftops.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A residential area rendered in a sickly, intense green monochrome and overlaid with a prominent scanline and pixel-grid pattern reminiscent of degraded analog monitors or low-resolution retro displays. Houses with pitched roofs, trees, and shrubs line a road beneath a cloudy sky, but the coarse dot-matrix screen effect and toxic green tint dominate the view, giving the suburban scene an unsettling, contaminated appearance.
